compiled_state.title: GREEN: Implement reduce_all_tickets() batch mode in ticket-reducer.py
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

Add `reduce_all_tickets(tracker_dir)` function to `plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-reducer.py` that:
1. Lists all non-hidden subdirectories in tracker_dir
2. Calls existing `reduce_ticket()` for each directory
3. For None returns (no CREATE event), builds a fallback error dict with `status=error, error=reducer_failed` (same logic as current ticket-list.sh lines 96-103)
4. Returns a list of compiled ticket state dicts

Add CLI support: when called with `--batch <tracker_dir>`, outputs JSON array to stdout and exits 0.

## File Impact
- Modify: `plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-reducer.py`

## TDD Requirement (GREEN)
Tests from task ebb4-0961 go GREEN. Specifically: test_batch_reduce_returns_all_tickets, test_batch_reduce_empty_tracker, test_batch_reduce_handles_ghost_tickets, test_batch_reduce_output_equivalent_to_individual all pass.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] `ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py
- [ ] Function `reduce_all_tickets` exists in ticket-reducer.py
  Verify: python3 -c "import importlib.util; s=importlib.util.spec_from_file_location('r','plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-reducer.py'); m=importlib.util.module_from_spec(s); s.loader.exec_module(m); assert hasattr(m,'reduce_all_tickets')"
- [ ] CLI --batch mode exits 0 on empty dir
  Verify: mkdir -p /tmp/test-batch-empty && python3 plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-reducer.py --batch /tmp/test-batch-empty | python3 -c "import json,sys; assert json.load(sys.stdin)==[]"
- [ ] All 4 batch reducer tests pass (GREEN)
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-ticket-reducer-batch.sh 2>&1 | grep -c 'PASS' | awk '{exit ($1 < 4)}'
- [ ] Remove RED marker from .test-index for ticket-reducer.py after tests pass
  Verify: ! grep -q 'ticket-reducer.py.*\[' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index || true
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Gap Analysis Amendment

### Output Contract
--batch outputs a JSON array of compiled ticket state dicts to stdout, identical in structure to what ticket-list.sh currently assembles from individual calls. For directories where reduce_ticket() returns None (no CREATE event, empty dir), emit a fallback {status: error, error: reducer_failed, ticket_id: <id>} dict matching ticket-list.sh lines 96-103.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: Implemented reduce_all_tickets() with --batch CLI mode. All 4 batch reducer tests GREEN.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: reduce_all_tickets() implemented with --batch CLI. All tests GREEN.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
